sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID like '[batchID]%' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like (cast(GL as varchar) + ' - Translation Using %')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like (cast(GL as varchar) + ' - Valuation on %')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (substring(Txt,8,21) = ' - Translation Using ' or substring(Txt,8,16) = ' - Valuation on ')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger <> 'IF'
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = 'H'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Assgnmt,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,GL,Amt1,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co,Assgnmt,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,GL,Amt1,Txt,PC,TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1, Assgnmt = (cast(Assgnmt as varchar) + ' ' + cast(GL as varchar)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select KeyID, Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Crcy,substring(Txt,1,7) as GL,-Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2850500' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2850996' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2850996' as Txt,PC,'991' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2850996' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2585000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2599996' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2599996' as Txt,PC,'991' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2599996' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','1935000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'1935996' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 1935996' as Txt,PC,'991' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '1935996' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2850500' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2850998' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2850998' as Txt,PC,'990' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2850998' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','2585000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'2599998' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 2599998' as Txt,PC,'990' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '2599998' group by Co, PC )

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,'QU','[yyyy-mm-dd]','[yyyy-mm-dd]','1935000' as GL,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,'1935998' as Assgnmt,'Balancing 1935998' as Txt,PC,'990' as TTY from TransX where (KeyID = '[batchID]' or KeyID = '[batchID]-data3') and GL = '1935998' group by Co, PC )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,GL,Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Co,Flex3,Date2,Date1,Assgnmt as GL,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like 'Balancing %')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) from TransX where KeyID like '[batchID]'

update TransX set FSitem = OS_GL, FSitemDesc = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t left join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru where KeyID like '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
